members.name: GetDefaultTheme
members.summary: Returns a reference to the default engine [Theme]. This theme resource is responsible for the out-of-the-box look of [Control] nodes and cannot be overridden.

members.name: GetProjectTheme
members.summary: Returns a reference to the custom project [Theme]. This theme resources allows to override the default engine theme for every control node in the project. To set the project theme, see [member ProjectSettings.gui/theme/custom].

members.name: FallbackBaseScale
members.summary: The fallback base scale factor of every [Control] node and [Theme] resource. Used when no other value is available to the control. See also [member Theme.default_base_scale].

members.name: FallbackFont
members.summary: The fallback font of every [Control] node and [Theme] resource. Used when no other value is available to the control. See also [member Theme.default_font].

members.name: FallbackFontSize
members.summary: The fallback font size of every [Control] node and [Theme] resource. Used when no other value is available to the control. See also [member Theme.default_font_size].

members.name: FallbackIcon
members.summary: The fallback icon of every [Control] node and [Theme] resource. Used when no other value is available to the control.

members.name: FallbackStylebox
members.summary: The fallback stylebox of every [Control] node and [Theme] resource. Used when no other value is available to the control.

signals.name: FallbackChanged
signals.summary: Emitted when one of the fallback values had been changed. Use it to refresh the look of controls that may rely on the fallback theme items.
